pre_circuit_soda.speaker: Night Ledger
pre_circuit_soda.text: Complete the soda circuit. I only audit signals that can reach an output.

pre_circuit_soda.speaker: Player
pre_circuit_soda.text: I still do not know why this cabinet has opinions about plumbing.

archive_bills.speaker: Player
archive_bills.text: Rent past due. Payroll delayed. Three repair invoices... every total is circled twice. The smeared signature feels familiar.

archive_bills_post_reveal.speaker: Player
archive_bills_post_reveal.text: These papers were mine. I kept circling the totals as if one more pass could make enough money appear.

archive_bills_post_reveal.speaker: Player
archive_bills_post_reveal.text: I remember folding them into this drawer before opening time. I wanted the lights to stay kind for everyone else.

archive_tv.speaker: Player
archive_tv.text: An old tube television with a repair-shop sticker. The case has been opened more than once.

archive_tv.speaker: Player
archive_tv.text: A note says the replacement was denied because the old one still worked. Whoever owned this place kept repairing yesterday because tomorrow cost too much.

archive_tv_post_reveal.speaker: Player
archive_tv_post_reveal.text: That television was mine. I watched its late-night flicker wash over repair receipts from this exact spot.

archive_tv_post_reveal.speaker: Player
archive_tv_post_reveal.text: I kept saying the old set still worked. Maybe I needed one familiar thing to keep working.

quest_intro.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_intro.text: EVERYTHING IN THIS ROOM IS OPERATIONAL. THE ARCHIVE RUN IS READY WHEN YOU ARE.

quest_intro.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_intro.text: OWNER SIGNATURE PRESENT. OWNER APPEARS SURPRISED BY OWNERSHIP.

quest_intro.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_intro.text: I am Night Ledger. I audited closing shifts. I now also have teeth. Metaphorically.

quest_intro.speaker: Player
quest_intro.text: That last word did not help.

quest_intro.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_intro.text: My archive is a vertical audit. Climb the switchback shelves and use marked gates between floors.

quest_intro.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_intro.text: Hold jump for height. Three extra jumps remain available in the air.

quest_intro.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_intro.text: Collect twelve numbered stamps in order and three keys. The mint opens when the record balances.

quest_intro.speaker: Player
quest_intro.text: Whatever token this mints does not seem necessary, but double-jump accounting might be entertaining.

quest_intro.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_intro.text: INTERACT AGAIN WHEN READY. I WILL REMAIN CASUALLY OMINOUS.

quest_hint.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_hint.text: AUDIT READY. STAMPS 1-12. THREE KEYS. VERTICAL ROUTE.

quest_hint.speaker: Night Ledger
quest_hint.text: Receipt ghosts reset your position, not your collected records.

quest_hint.speaker: Player
quest_hint.text: Good. I prefer my bureaucracy difficult but merciful.

token_return_player.speaker: Player
token_return_player.text: This token has two rings around one center. I am not sure whether that is a design choice or a warning.

token_return_player.speaker: Player
token_return_player.text: Night Ledger minted it. I should ask that strange cabinet what it thinks I just found.

token_debrief.speaker: Night Ledger
token_debrief.text: DUPLEX TOKEN ACCEPTED. One owner signature. Two authorization traces.

token_debrief.speaker: Night Ledger
token_debrief.text: Early entries paid for birthday lights and free plays. Later margins carried rent, payroll, and repairs.

token_debrief.speaker: Night Ledger
token_debrief.text: The handwriting stayed the same. The two margins stopped sharing a line.

token_debrief.speaker: Player
token_debrief.text: That sounds less like two people and more like one person being pulled apart.

token_debrief.speaker: Player
token_debrief.text: It spent its last charge on that answer. I may have learned enough to be more careful, not enough to be certain.

offline_until_postgame.speaker: Player
offline_until_postgame.text: Night Ledger is dark. It does not look like it will power on again tonight.

post_reveal_reboot.speaker: Night Ledger
post_reveal_reboot.text: POST-CLOSING RESERVE ONLINE. OWNER SIGNATURE RECONCILED.

post_reveal_reboot.speaker: Night Ledger
post_reveal_reboot.text: The two margins can occupy one page again.

post_reveal_reboot.speaker: Player
post_reveal_reboot.text: Not neatly. But together is enough for tonight.
